## Name

<!-- Short, single word. e.g. "Aurora", "Wireframe", "Brutalist" -->

## Vibe

<!-- One or two sentences. Who is this for? What does it feel like? -->

## Reference / mockup

<!-- Screenshot, Figma link, or hand-drawn sketch. Strongly preferred. -->

## Color & typography

- Palette:
- Typeface(s):
- Light / dark / both:

## What's special

<!-- Layout choice? Interaction? Print-style? Bento? Help reviewers see why this isn't a dupe of an existing template. -->

## Handles missing fields

How does it look when the user has no avatar, no projects, no experience? (Templates must not crash on partial data.)

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe, with design feedback
- [ ] No, proposing for someone else to pick up
